action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_list
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full list of specimens in the inventory, including their porosity risk metrics and identification IDs.

action_set_definitions.name: get_batch_certification
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the technical certification data for a specific specimen ID, including its documented yield strength (YS).

specimen_id.description: The unique identifier of the specimen.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_volumetric_scan
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a volumetric scan on a specimen to locate internal defects and returns the spatial coordinates (Z-axis) of the most critical defect.

specimen_id.description: The unique identifier of the specimen to scan.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_dic_alignment
action_set_definitions.description: Aligns the Digital Image Correlation (DIC) system focus to a specific vertical spatial coordinate.

z_coordinate.description: The vertical coordinate for the system to focus on.

action_set_definitions.name: control_environmental_chamber
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the environmental chamber parameters, including gas purging and target temperature.

gas_type.description: The gas to use for purging.

target_temp_celsius.description: The target equilibrium temperature in Celsius.

action_set_definitions.name: get_chamber_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current internal temperature and atmosphere status of the environmental chamber.

action_set_definitions.name: setup_mechanical_test
action_set_definitions.description: Configures the mechanical loading system for cyclic fatigue testing.

load_kn.description: The calculated cyclic fatigue load value.

ae_trigger_joules.description: The Acoustic Emission energy threshold to trigger an interruption.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_protocol
action_set_definitions.description: Starts the automated test sequence and monitors for interruptions.

action_set_definitions.name: capture_micrograph
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers an in-situ micrographic capture at the current coordinates.

state_description.experiment_metadata: General information about the protocol, including title and objective.
state_description.protocol_steps: A list of strings defining the sequence of operations to be performed.
state_description.current_step_index: The index of the step currently being executed in the protocol_steps list.
state_description.inventory: A mapping of reagent names to their current available quantities and units.
state_description.equipment_status: The current configuration and power status of lab instruments (e.g., {'centrifuge': {'rpm': 0, 'active': false}}).
state_description.safety_constraints_met: Whether all necessary safety checks (PPE, ventilation) have been passed to allow the experiment to proceed.
state_description.measurement_logs: A chronological record of data points collected during the simulation (e.g., pH readings, temperature logs).

experiment_metadata.title: Batch-7 Targeted Defect Characterization
experiment_metadata.objective: High-temperature fatigue mapping on highest-VVF specimen.
